thinking.text: The transfer was successful. Let me inform the customer.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
I understand, Kenji. I've transferred you to a human agent who will be able to assist you further. Here's a quick summary of what was discussed so they can pick up right where we left off:

- **Name:** Kenji Tanaka
- **Request:** Change your email address on file
- **Verification Status:** Phone number (206-555-0293) was verified, but we couldn't fully complete identity verification as you didn't have your date of birth or address handy at the moment
- **Reason for transfer:** Alternative verification methods were not available through our system

A human agent will be with you shortly. Thank you for your patience, Kenji!
